purpose: Public Exafuse proof-map signals used to strengthen Manish Sharma Lab without duplicating company service pages or treating process-monitoring content as certification.
artifact_boundary: The brief is preliminary decision-support only. It is not engineering approval, material certification, safety-critical acceptance, or a quality guarantee.

artifact_planning_labels.brief_completeness: Completeness describes whether the brief can support a useful conversation. It is not feasibility, approval, or release evidence.
artifact_planning_labels.expert_review_package_status: Expert-review package status describes whether the current package is ready for expert review, not approval.
artifact_planning_labels.evidence_burden: Evidence burden is a planning label, not release approval.

no_backend_rule: The cockpit and workbench are frontend-only: no backend endpoints, no input storage, no analytics around user-entered technical content, and no automatic email sending. Manual email drafts are not sent unless the user sends them from their own email client.
migration_note: Case-study and new knowledge deep links should be treated as production links only after Exafuse migration verification. Until then, use the safe production index/contact URLs.

case_studies.title: Duisburg Bridge Components with LMD
public_signals: independent validation context where production source confirms it
case_studies.decision_pattern_extracted: Large-scale LMD requires evidence planning, monitoring context, and an inspection boundary.
case_studies.decision_pattern_boundary: This is a pattern, not a transfer of feasibility.

case_studies.title: Forging Hammer Repair and Coating with LMD
public_signals: hardness is not enough by itself
case_studies.decision_pattern_extracted: Local repair needs material, damage depth, machining route, and inspection plan.
case_studies.decision_pattern_boundary: This is a pattern, not a transfer of feasibility.

case_studies.title: Nobufil Extrusion Screw Repair
case_studies.decision_pattern_extracted: Repair/RFQ quality depends on complete facts, downtime context, and service context.
case_studies.decision_pattern_boundary: This is a pattern, not a transfer of feasibility.

case_studies.title: Build-and-Coat Drill Workflow
case_studies.decision_pattern_extracted: Build-and-coat routes need geometry, surface function, material, finishing, and validation.
case_studies.decision_pattern_boundary: This is a pattern, not a transfer of feasibility.

claim_boundary: These are public Exafuse proof signals. They support public technical context and buyer education, not engineering approval, certification, guaranteed outcomes, or confidential project details.
